---
title: "DeepSeek — Data Profile"
subtitle: "Catalogo descritivo dos parquets do parser canonico"
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| label: setup

import sys
from pathlib import Path

_this = Path.cwd()
_project_root = _this if (_this / "src").exists() else _this.parent
sys.path.insert(0, str(_project_root))

import json
import pandas as pd
import duckdb
import plotly.graph_objects as go
from itables import init_notebook_mode, show

init_notebook_mode(all_interactive=False)

PROCESSED = _project_root / "data" / "processed" / "DeepSeek"
con = duckdb.connect()
for table in ("conversations", "messages", "tool_events", "branches"):
    p = PROCESSED / f"deepseek_{table}.parquet"
    if p.exists():
        con.execute(f"CREATE VIEW {table} AS SELECT * FROM read_parquet('{p}')")

# DeepSeek brand: blue royal
SOURCE_COLOR = "#4D6BFE"
ACCENT = "#1E2856"
MUTED = "#D1D5DB"


def fmt_pct(n, total):
    pct = n / total * 100 if total else 0
    return f"{n:,}/{total:,} ({pct:.0f}%)"


def show_df(df, **kwargs):
    from IPython.display import display
    display(df.style.hide(axis="index"))


def plotly_bar(x, y, title, color=SOURCE_COLOR, height=350, orientation="v"):
    fig = (go.Figure(go.Bar(y=x, x=y, marker_color=color, orientation="h"))
           if orientation == "h" else
           go.Figure(go.Bar(x=x, y=y, marker_color=color)))
    fig.update_layout(title=title, height=height, template="plotly_white",
                      margin=dict(t=50, b=40, l=40, r=20))
    return fig
```

# Visao geral

```{python}
#| label: overview

totals = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM conversations) AS conversations,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages) AS messages,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tool_events) AS tool_events,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM branches) AS branches
""").df()

range_dt = con.execute("SELECT MIN(created_at) AS oldest, MAX(created_at) AS newest FROM conversations").df()

show_df(pd.DataFrame([
    {"Tabela": "conversations.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['conversations'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": f"{range_dt['oldest'].iloc[0]:%Y-%m-%d} → {range_dt['newest'].iloc[0]:%Y-%m-%d}"},
    {"Tabela": "messages.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['messages'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": "—"},
    {"Tabela": "tool_events.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['tool_events'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": "—"},
    {"Tabela": "branches.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['branches'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": "—"},
]))
```

> **Sobre.** Catalogo descritivo do DeepSeek. Highlights: R1 reasoning chain
> (`thinking_content`), latency (`thinking_elapsed_secs`), token usage
> cumulativo, search_results estruturados, branches via parent_id (DAG plano).

# 1. Conversations

```{python}
#| label: conv-stats

cov = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(title) AS title,
        COUNT(model) AS model,
        SUM(is_pinned::INT) AS pinned,
        SUM(is_preserved_missing::INT) AS preserved
    FROM conversations
""").df()
total = cov["total"].iloc[0]
def cv(f): return fmt_pct(int(cov[f].iloc[0]), int(total))

show_df(pd.DataFrame([
    {"Campo": "title", "Cobertura": cv("title")},
    {"Campo": "model", "Cobertura": cv("model")},
    {"Campo": "is_pinned", "Cobertura": f"{int(cov['pinned'].iloc[0])} flagged"},
    {"Campo": "is_preserved_missing", "Cobertura": f"{int(cov['preserved'].iloc[0])} flagged"},
]))
```

## 1.1 Mode (chat / agent / R1 thinking)

```{python}
#| label: modes

modes = con.execute("""
    SELECT mode, COUNT(*) AS n FROM conversations GROUP BY mode ORDER BY n DESC
""").df()
show_df(modes)
fig = plotly_bar(x=modes["mode"], y=modes["n"], title="Sessions por mode", height=300)
fig.show()
```

## 1.2 Top models

```{python}
#| label: top-models

top = con.execute("""
    SELECT model, COUNT(*) AS n FROM conversations
    WHERE model IS NOT NULL GROUP BY model ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 10
""").df()
if not top.empty:
    show_df(top)
```

# 2. Messages

```{python}
#| label: msg-stats

mc = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(thinking) AS with_thinking,
        COUNT(citations_json) AS with_citations,
        COUNT(token_count) AS with_tokens,
        COUNT(attachment_names) AS with_files,
        COUNT(finish_reason) AS with_finish
    FROM messages
""").df()
mtotal = mc["total"].iloc[0]
def mv(f): return fmt_pct(int(mc[f].iloc[0]), int(mtotal))

show_df(pd.DataFrame([
    {"Campo": "thinking (R1 reasoning chain)", "Cobertura": mv("with_thinking")},
    {"Campo": "citations_json (search_results inline)", "Cobertura": mv("with_citations")},
    {"Campo": "token_count (accumulated_token_usage)", "Cobertura": mv("with_tokens")},
    {"Campo": "attachment_names (files)", "Cobertura": mv("with_files")},
    {"Campo": "finish_reason (status + incomplete_message)", "Cobertura": mv("with_finish")},
]))
```

## 2.1 R1 reasoning — uso por modelo

```{python}
#| label: r1-by-model

r1 = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        model,
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(thinking) AS with_thinking,
        ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(thinking) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct
    FROM messages
    WHERE role = 'assistant'
    GROUP BY model
    ORDER BY total DESC
""").df()
show_df(r1)
```

## 2.2 Token usage (accumulated)

```{python}
#| label: tokens

t = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        AVG(token_count) AS avg, MEDIAN(token_count)::INT AS median,
        MAX(token_count) AS max,
        SUM(token_count) AS total
    FROM messages WHERE token_count IS NOT NULL
""").df()
show_df(t)
```

## 2.3 finish_reason distribution

```{python}
#| label: finish-reason

f = con.execute("""
    SELECT finish_reason, COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM messages WHERE finish_reason IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY finish_reason ORDER BY n DESC
""").df()
show_df(f)
```

# 3. ToolEvents

```{python}
#| label: tool-events

ev = con.execute("""
    SELECT event_type, COUNT(*) AS n FROM tool_events GROUP BY event_type ORDER BY n DESC
""").df()
if not ev.empty:
    show_df(ev)
```

# 4. Branches (forks via parent_id)

```{python}
#| label: branches

br = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        SUM(is_active::INT) AS main,
        SUM((NOT is_active)::INT) AS secondary,
        COUNT(*) AS total
    FROM branches
""").df()
show_df(br)

# Distribuicao de N branches por session
distrib = con.execute("""
    WITH counts AS (SELECT conversation_id, COUNT(*) AS n_br FROM branches GROUP BY conversation_id)
    SELECT n_br, COUNT(*) AS n_sessions FROM counts GROUP BY n_br ORDER BY n_br
""").df()
show_df(distrib)
```

# 5. Preservation

```{python}
#| label: preservation

p = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        CASE WHEN is_preserved_missing THEN 'Preserved' ELSE 'Active' END AS status,
        COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM conversations GROUP BY is_preserved_missing
""").df()
show_df(p)
```
